text: Maintaining a healthy lifestyle involves more than just eating vegetables. A balanced diet with fruits, proteins, and whole grains gives you energy, while regular exercise, like walking or cycling, strengthens your body and reduces stress. However, sleep is equally important: aim for seven to nine hours each night to help your brain and body recover. Mental health also plays a key role. Taking time to relax, practice mindfulness, or talk to friends can improve your mood and reduce anxiety. Finally, work-life balance is essential. Set boundaries between work and personal time to avoid burnout. By combining these habits, you can create a healthier, happier life.
